MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Suzanne L. Earnest, Esq., for failure off plaintiff to appear at the Pre-Arb. S/C heard this day. There being no appearance or a response filed.
